chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Revision Application No.S- 61 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.12.2025. Mr. Asif Ali Bhelar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = Counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this Criminal Revision Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Tufail
